You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 25.01 (commit: a24e5d1d).

## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA] Show lists directly on dropdown menu if there are 2 or fewer
We are currently grouping the Lists in a "Lists" submenu independent of the number of lists the user has, but we should only show that submenu when the user has over 2 lists.

So if the user has 2 or fewer, they should be displayed directly in the menu root.

![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/5091503/57e663d9-218f-4a58-a447-05a86406ea86)

Internal ref: pcdRpT-4tr-p2#comment-7237

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 59→                }
 60→        }
 61→    }
 62→
 63→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 64→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 65→            id = id,
 66→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 67→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 68→        )
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 72→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 73→            id = id,
 74→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 75→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 76→        )
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 80→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 81→            id = id,
 82→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 83→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 84→        )
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 88→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 89→            id = id,
 90→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 91→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 92→        )
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 96→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 97→            id = id,
 98→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 99→        )
100→    }
101→
102→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
103→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
104→            id = id,
105→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
106→        )
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
110→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
111→            id = id,
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
113→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
118→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
119→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
120→            customListsMenuItems.add(
121→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
122→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
123→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
124→                )
125→            )
126→        }
127→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
128→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
129→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
130→            id = "custom-lists",
131→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
132→            children = customListsMenuItems,
133→        )
134→    }
135→
136→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
137→
138→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
139→}
140→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.UploadStore
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadActionUseCase
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 9→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemUploadStatus
10→import javax.inject.Inject
11→import kotlin.math.roundToInt
12→
13→/**
14→ * This is a temporary class to make the PostListViewModel more manageable. Please feel free to refactor it any way
15→ * you see fit.
16→ */
17→class PostModelUploadStatusTracker @Inject constructor(
18→    private val uploadStore: UploadStore,
19→    private val uploadActionUseCase: UploadActionUseCase
20→) {
21→    /*
22→    Using `SparseArray` is results in ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when we are trying to put a new item. Although
23→    the reason for the crash is unclear, this defeats the whole purpose of using a `SparseArray`. Furthermore,
24→    `SparseArray` is actually not objectively better than using a `HashMap` and in this case `HashMap` should perform
25→    better due to higher number of items.
26→
27→    https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/11487
28→     */
29→    @SuppressLint("UseSparseArrays")
30→    private val uploadStatusMap = HashMap<Int, PostListItemUploadStatus>()
31→
32→    fun getUploadStatus(post: PostModel, siteModel: SiteModel): PostListItemUploadStatus {
33→        uploadStatusMap[post.id]?.let { return it }
34→        val uploadError = uploadStore.getUploadErrorForPost(post)
35→        val isUploadingOrQueued = UploadService.isPostUploadingOrQueued(post)
36→        val hasInProgressMediaUpload = UploadService.hasInProgressMediaUploadsForPost(post)
37→        val newStatus = PostListItemUploadStatus(
38→            uploadError = uploadError,
39→            mediaUploadProgress = (UploadService.getMediaUploadProgressForPost(post) * 100).roundToInt(),
40→            isUploading = UploadService.isPostUploading(post),
41→            isUploadingOrQueued = isUploadingOrQueued,
42→            isQueued = UploadService.isPostQueued(post),
43→            isUploadFailed = uploadStore.isFailedPost(post),
44→            hasInProgressMediaUpload = hasInProgressMediaUpload,
45→            hasPendingMediaUpload = UploadService.hasPendingMediaUploadsForPost(post),
46→            isEligibleForAutoUpload = uploadActionUseCase.isEligibleForAutoUpload(siteModel, post),
47→            uploadWillPushChanges = uploadActionUseCase.uploadWillPushChanges(post)
48→        )
49→        uploadStatusMap[post.id] = newStatus
50→        return newStatus
51→    }
52→
53→    fun invalidateUploadStatus(localPostIds: List<Int>) {
54→        localPostIds.forEach { uploadStatusMap.remove(it) }
55→    }
56→}
57→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown
 2→
 3→import androidx.annotation.DrawableRes
 4→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 5→
 6→sealed interface MenuElementData {
 7→    data object Divider : MenuElementData
 8→
 9→    sealed class Item(
10→        open val id: String,
11→        open val text: UiString,
12→        @DrawableRes open val leadingIcon: Int,
13→    ) : MenuElementData {
14→        // Item element that closes the menu when clicked
15→        data class Single(
16→            override val id: String,
17→            override val text: UiString,
18→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
19→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
20→
21→        // Sub-menu element that opens a sub-menu when clicked
22→        data class SubMenu(
23→            override val id: String,
24→            override val text: UiString,
25→            val children: List<MenuElementData>,
26→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
27→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
28→    }
29→}
30→
31→internal const val NO_ICON = -1

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.MediaActionBuilder
 6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.MediaModel
 7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore
 9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.MediaPayload
10→
11→/**
12→ * This is a temporary class to make the PostListViewModel more manageable. Please feel free to refactor it any way
13→ * you see fit.
14→ */
15→class PostListFeaturedImageTracker(private val dispatcher: Dispatcher, private val mediaStore: MediaStore) {
16→    /*
17→    Using `SparseArray` is results in ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when we are trying to put a new item. Although
18→    the reason for the crash is unclear, this defeats the whole purpose of using a `SparseArray`. Furthermore,
19→    `SparseArray` is actually not objectively better than using a `HashMap` and in this case `HashMap` should perform
20→    better due to higher number of items.
21→
22→    https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/11487
23→     */
24→    @SuppressLint("UseSparseArrays")
25→    private val featuredImageMap = HashMap<Long, String>()
26→
27→    fun getFeaturedImageUrl(site: SiteModel, featuredImageId: Long): String? {
28→        if (featuredImageId == 0L) {
29→            return null
30→        }
31→        featuredImageMap[featuredImageId]?.let { return it }
32→        mediaStore.getSiteMediaWithId(site, featuredImageId)?.let { media ->
33→            // This should be a pretty rare case, but some media seems to be missing url
34→            return if (media.url.isNotBlank()) {
35→                featuredImageMap[featuredImageId] = media.url
36→                media.url
37→            } else null
38→        }
39→        // Media is not in the Store, we need to download it
40→        val mediaToDownload = MediaModel(
41→            site.id,
42→            featuredImageId
43→        )
44→        val payload = MediaPayload(site, mediaToDownload)
45→        dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaAction(payload))
46→        return null
47→    }
48→
49→    fun invalidateFeaturedMedia(featuredImageIds: List<Long>) {
50→        featuredImageIds.forEach { featuredImageMap.remove(it) }
51→    }
52→}
53→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitemonitor
  2→
  3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
  4→import android.os.Build
  5→import android.os.Bundle
  6→import android.util.SparseArray
  7→import android.view.View
  8→import android.view.ViewGroup
  9→import android.webkit.WebView
 10→import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
 11→import androidx.activity.viewModels
 12→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
 13→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Arrangement
 14→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Box
 15→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.Column
 16→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxHeight
 17→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxSize
 18→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.fillMaxWidth
 19→import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.padding
 20→import androidx.compose.foundation.lazy.LazyColumn
 21→import androidx.compose.material.Button
 22→import androidx.compose.material.ExperimentalMaterialApi
 23→import androidx.compose.material.MaterialTheme
 24→import androidx.compose.material.Scaffold
 25→import androidx.compose.material.Text
 26→import androidx.compose.material.pullrefresh.PullRefreshIndicator
 27→import androidx.compose.material.pullrefresh.pullRefresh
 28→import androidx.compose.material.pullrefresh.rememberPullRefreshState
 29→import androidx.compose.material3.CircularProgressIndicator
 30→import androidx.compose.material3.Surface
 31→import androidx.compose.material3.Tab
 32→import androidx.compose.material3.TabRow
 33→import androidx.compose.material3.TabRowDefaults
 34→import androidx.compose.material3.TabRowDefaults.tabIndicatorOffset
 35→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
 36→import androidx.compose.runtime.LaunchedEffect
 37→import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
 38→import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
 39→import androidx.compose.runtime.remember
 40→import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
 41→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
 42→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 43→import androidx.compose.ui.res.stringResource
 44→import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextAlign
 45→import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextOverflow
 46→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
 47→import androidx.compose.ui.viewinterop.AndroidView
 48→import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment
 49→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
 50→import org.wordpress.android.R
 51→import org.wordpress.android.WordPress
 52→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 53→import org.wordpress.android.ui.WPWebViewActivity
 54→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.MainTopAppBar
 55→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.NavigationIcons
 56→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.theme.AppTheme
 57→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.utils.uiStringText
 58→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.getSerializableExtraCompat
 59→import javax.inject.Inject
 60→
 61→@SuppressLint("SetJavaScriptEnabled")
 62→@AndroidEntryPoint
 63→class SiteMonitorParentActivity : AppCompatActivity(), SiteMonitorWebViewClient.SiteMonitorWebViewClientListener {
 64→    @Inject
 65→    lateinit var siteMonitorUtils: SiteMonitorUtils
 66→
 67→    private var savedStateSparseArray = SparseArray<Fragment.SavedState>()
 68→    private var currentSelectItemId = 0
 69→
 70→    private val siteMonitorParentViewModel: SiteMonitorParentViewModel by viewModels()
 71→
 72→    private val metricsWebView by lazy {
 73→        commonWebView(SiteMonitorType.METRICS)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    private val phpLogsWebView by lazy {
 77→        commonWebView(SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS)
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    private val webServerLogsWebView by lazy {
 81→        commonWebView(SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS)
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    private fun commonWebView(
 85→        siteMonitorType: SiteMonitorType
 86→    ) = WebView(this@SiteMonitorParentActivity).apply {
 87→        layoutParams = ViewGroup.LayoutParams(
 88→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
 89→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
 90→        )
 91→        scrollBarStyle = View.SCROLLBARS_INSIDE_OVERLAY
 92→        settings.userAgentString = siteMonitorUtils.getUserAgent()
 93→        settings.javaScriptEnabled = true
 94→        settings.domStorageEnabled = true
 95→        webViewClient = SiteMonitorWebViewClient(this@SiteMonitorParentActivity, siteMonitorType)
 96→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
 97→            // not sure about this one, double check if this works as expected
 98→            settings.isAlgorithmicDarkeningAllowed = true
 99→        }
100→    }
101→
102→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
103→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
104→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
105→
106→        if (savedInstanceState != null) {
107→            savedStateSparseArray = savedInstanceState.getSparseParcelableArray(
108→                SAVED_STATE_CONTAINER_KEY
109→            )
110→                ?: savedStateSparseArray
111→            currentSelectItemId = savedInstanceState.getInt(SAVED_STATE_CURRENT_TAB_KEY)
112→            siteMonitorParentViewModel.loadData()
113→        } else {
114→            siteMonitorParentViewModel.start(getSite())
115→            currentSelectItemId = getInitialTab()
116→        }
117→        setContent {
118→            AppTheme {
119→                Surface(
120→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
121→                ) {
122→                    SiteMonitorScreen(initialTab = currentSelectItemId)
123→                }
124→            }
125→        }
126→    }
127→
128→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
129→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
130→        outState.putSparseParcelableArray(SAVED_STATE_CONTAINER_KEY, savedStateSparseArray)
131→        outState.putInt(SAVED_STATE_CURRENT_TAB_KEY, currentSelectItemId)
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun getSite(): SiteModel {
135→        return requireNotNull(intent.getSerializableExtraCompat(WordPress.SITE)) as SiteModel
136→    }
137→
138→    private fun getInitialTab(): Int {
139→        val tab = intent?.getSerializableExtraCompat(ARG_SITE_MONITOR_TYPE_KEY) as SiteMonitorType?
140→            ?: SiteMonitorType.METRICS
141→        return when (tab) {
142→            SiteMonitorType.METRICS -> 0
143→            SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS -> 1
144→            SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS -> 2
145→        }
146→    }
147→
148→    companion object {
149→        const val ARG_SITE_MONITOR_TYPE_KEY = "ARG_SITE_MONITOR_TYPE_KEY"
150→        const val SAVED_STATE_CONTAINER_KEY = "ContainerKey"
151→        const val SAVED_STATE_CURRENT_TAB_KEY = "CurrentTabKey"
152→    }
153→
154→    @Composable
155→    @SuppressLint("UnusedMaterialScaffoldPaddingParameter")
156→    fun SiteMonitorScreen(initialTab: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
157→        Scaffold(
158→            topBar = {
159→                MainTopAppBar(
160→                    title = stringResource(id = R.string.site_monitoring),
161→                    navigationIcon = NavigationIcons.BackIcon,
162→                    onNavigationIconClick = onBackPressedDispatcher::onBackPressed,
163→                )
164→            },
165→            content = {
166→                SiteMonitorHeader(initialTab, modifier = modifier)
167→            }
168→        )
169→    }
170→
171→    @Composable
172→    @SuppressLint("UnusedMaterialScaffoldPaddingParameter")
173→    fun SiteMonitorHeader(initialTab: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
174→        var tabIndex by remember { mutableStateOf(initialTab) }
175→
176→        val tabs = SiteMonitorTabItem.entries
177→
178→        LaunchedEffect(true) {
179→            siteMonitorUtils.trackTabLoaded(tabs[initialTab].siteMonitorType)
180→        }
181→
182→        Column(modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
183→            TabRow(
184→                selectedTabIndex = tabIndex,
185→                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface,
186→                contentColor = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface,
187→                indicator = { tabPositions ->
188→                    // Customizing the indicator color and style
189→                    TabRowDefaults.Indicator(
190→                        Modifier.tabIndicatorOffset(tabPositions[tabIndex]),
191→                        color = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface,
192→                        height = 2.0.dp
193→                    )
194→                }
195→            ) {
196→                tabs.forEachIndexed { index, item ->
197→                    Tab(
198→                        text = {
199→                            Column(horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally) {
200→                                Text(
201→                                    text = stringResource(item.title).uppercase(),
202→                                    maxLines = 1,
203→                                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
204→                                )
205→                            }
206→                        },
207→                        selected = tabIndex == index,
208→                        onClick = {
209→                            siteMonitorUtils.trackTabLoaded(tabs[index].siteMonitorType)
210→                            tabIndex = index
211→                        },
212→                    )
213→                }
214→            }
215→            when (tabIndex) {
216→                0 -> SiteMonitorTabContent(SiteMonitorType.METRICS)
217→                1 -> SiteMonitorTabContent(SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS)
218→                2 -> SiteMonitorTabContent(SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS)
219→            }
220→        }
221→    }
222→
223→    @Composable
224→    private fun SiteMonitorTabContent(tabType: SiteMonitorType, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
225→        val uiState by remember(key1 = tabType) {
226→            siteMonitorParentViewModel.getUiState(tabType)
227→        }
228→        when (uiState) {
229→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Preparing -> LoadingState(modifier)
230→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Prepared, is SiteMonitorUiState.Loaded ->
231→                SiteMonitorWebViewContent(uiState, tabType, modifier)
232→
233→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Error -> SiteMonitorError(uiState as SiteMonitorUiState.Error, modifier)
234→        }
235→    }
236→
237→    @Composable
238→    fun LoadingState(modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
239→        Box(
240→            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center,
241→            modifier = modifier.fillMaxSize()
242→        ) {
243→            CircularProgressIndicator(
244→                color = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface
245→            )
246→        }
247→    }
248→
249→    @Composable
250→    fun SiteMonitorError(error: SiteMonitorUiState.Error, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
251→        Column(
252→            horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
253→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center,
254→            modifier = modifier
255→                .padding(20.dp)
256→                .fillMaxWidth()
257→                .fillMaxHeight(),
258→        ) {
259→            androidx.compose.material.Text(
260→                text = uiStringText(uiString = error.title),
261→                style = androidx.compose.material.MaterialTheme.typography.h5,
262→                textAlign = TextAlign.Center
263→            )
264→            androidx.compose.material.Text(
265→                text = uiStringText(uiString = error.description),
266→                style = androidx.compose.material.MaterialTheme.typography.body1,
267→                textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
268→                modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp)
269→            )
270→            if (error.button != null) {
271→                Button(
272→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp),
273→                    onClick = error.button.click
274→                ) {
275→                    Text(text = uiStringText(uiString = error.button.text))
276→                }
277→            }
278→        }
279→    }
280→
281→    @SuppressLint("SetJavaScriptEnabled")
282→    @Composable
283→    private fun SiteMonitorWebViewContent(
284→        uiState: SiteMonitorUiState,
285→        tabType: SiteMonitorType,
286→        modifier: Modifier = Modifier
287→    ) {
288→        // retrieve the webview from the actvity
289→        val webView = when (tabType) {
290→            SiteMonitorType.METRICS -> metricsWebView
291→            SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS -> phpLogsWebView
292→            SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS -> webServerLogsWebView
293→        }
294→
295→        when(uiState) {
296→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Prepared -> {
297→                webView.postUrl(WPWebViewActivity.WPCOM_LOGIN_URL, uiState.model.addressToLoad.toByteArray())
298→                LoadingState()
299→            }
300→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Loaded -> {
301→                SiteMonitorWebView(webView, tabType, modifier)
302→            }
303→            else -> {}
304→        }
305→    }
306→
307→    @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterialApi::class)
308→    @Composable
309→    private fun SiteMonitorWebView(tabWebView: WebView, tabType: SiteMonitorType, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
310→        // the webview is retrieved from the activity, so we need to use a mutable variable
311→        // to assign to android view
312→        var webView = tabWebView
313→
314→        val refreshState = siteMonitorParentViewModel.getRefreshState(tabType)
315→
316→        val pullRefreshState = rememberPullRefreshState(
317→            refreshing = refreshState.value,
318→            onRefresh = { siteMonitorParentViewModel.refreshData(tabType) }
319→        )
320→
321→        Box(
322→            modifier = modifier
323→                .fillMaxSize()
324→                .pullRefresh(pullRefreshState)
325→        ) {
326→            LazyColumn(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxHeight()) {
327→                item {
328→                    AndroidView(
329→                        factory = { webView },
330→                        update = { webView = it },
331→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
332→                    )
333→                }
334→            }
335→            PullRefreshIndicator(
336→                refreshing = refreshState.value,
337→                state = pullRefreshState,
338→                modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.TopCenter),
339→                contentColor = MaterialTheme.colors.primaryVariant,
340→            )
341→        }
342→    }
343→
344→    override fun onDestroy() {
345→        super.onDestroy()
346→        metricsWebView.destroy()
347→        phpLogsWebView.destroy()
348→        webServerLogsWebView.destroy()
349→    }
350→
351→    override fun onWebViewPageLoaded(url: String, tabType: SiteMonitorType) =
352→        siteMonitorParentViewModel.onUrlLoaded(tabType)
353→
354→    override fun onWebViewReceivedError(url: String, tabType: SiteMonitorType) {
355→        siteMonitorParentViewModel.onWebViewError(tabType)
356→        siteMonitorUtils.trackTabLoadingError(tabType)
357→    }
358→}
359→

294→    private fun List<MenuElementData>.findSingleItem(

301→        return find { it is MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu } as? MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu
302→    }

conversation_history.name: read
conversation_history.content:
1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    if (customListsArray.size() <= 2) {
 59→                        customListsArray.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 60→                            add(createCustomListItem(index, readerTag))
 61→                        }
 62→                    } else {
 63→                        add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 64→                    }
 65→                }
 66→        }
 67→    }
 68→
 69→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 70→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 71→            id = id,
 72→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 73→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 74→        )
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 78→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 79→            id = id,
 80→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 81→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 82→        )
 83→    }
 84→
 85→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 86→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 87→            id = id,
 88→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 89→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 90→        )
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 94→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 95→            id = id,
 96→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 97→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 98→        )
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
102→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
103→            id = id,
104→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
105→        )
106→    }
107→
108→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
109→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
110→            id = id,
111→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
112→        )
113→    }
114→
115→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
116→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
117→            id = id,
118→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
119→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
120→        )
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
124→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
125→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
126→            customListsMenuItems.add(createCustomListItem(index, readerTag))
127→        }
128→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
129→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
130→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
131→            id = "custom-lists",
132→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
133→            children = customListsMenuItems,
134→        )
135→    }
136→
137→    private fun createCustomListItem(index: Int, readerTag: ReaderTag): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
138→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
139→            id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
140→            text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
141→        )
142→    }
143→
144→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
145→
146→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
147→}

content.text:
I have updated `ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt` to show custom lists directly in the dropdown menu if there are 2 or fewer. If there are more than 2 lists, they remain grouped in a "Lists" submenu as before.

### Changes:
- Refactored `createMenu` in `ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt` to check the number of custom lists.
- If the number of custom lists is 2 or fewer, they are added directly to the menu root after a divider.
- Extracted the logic for creating a single custom list menu item into a new private method `createCustomListItem` to avoid code duplication.
- Updated `createCustomListsItem` to use the new `createCustomListItem` method.
- Added a new test file `ReaderTopBarMenuHelperNewTest.kt` with test cases for 1, 2, and 3 custom lists to verify the new behavior (although Mockito execution issues in the environment prevented running them, the logic was manually verified).

🤖 Generated with [Firebender](https://firebender.com)

Co-Authored-By: Firebender <help@firebender.com>

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.PostModel
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.UploadStore
 7→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadActionUseCase
 8→import org.wordpress.android.ui.uploads.UploadService
 9→import org.wordpress.android.viewmodel.posts.PostListItemUploadStatus
10→import javax.inject.Inject
11→import kotlin.math.roundToInt
12→
13→/**
14→ * This is a temporary class to make the PostListViewModel more manageable. Please feel free to refactor it any way
15→ * you see fit.
16→ */
17→class PostModelUploadStatusTracker @Inject constructor(
18→    private val uploadStore: UploadStore,
19→    private val uploadActionUseCase: UploadActionUseCase
20→) {
21→    /*
22→    Using `SparseArray` is results in ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when we are trying to put a new item. Although
23→    the reason for the crash is unclear, this defeats the whole purpose of using a `SparseArray`. Furthermore,
24→    `SparseArray` is actually not objectively better than using a `HashMap` and in this case `HashMap` should perform
25→    better due to higher number of items.
26→
27→    https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/11487
28→     */
29→    @SuppressLint("UseSparseArrays")
30→    private val uploadStatusMap = HashMap<Int, PostListItemUploadStatus>()
31→
32→    fun getUploadStatus(post: PostModel, siteModel: SiteModel): PostListItemUploadStatus {
33→        uploadStatusMap[post.id]?.let { return it }
34→        val uploadError = uploadStore.getUploadErrorForPost(post)
35→        val isUploadingOrQueued = UploadService.isPostUploadingOrQueued(post)
36→        val hasInProgressMediaUpload = UploadService.hasInProgressMediaUploadsForPost(post)
37→        val newStatus = PostListItemUploadStatus(
38→            uploadError = uploadError,
39→            mediaUploadProgress = (UploadService.getMediaUploadProgressForPost(post) * 100).roundToInt(),
40→            isUploading = UploadService.isPostUploading(post),
41→            isUploadingOrQueued = isUploadingOrQueued,
42→            isQueued = UploadService.isPostQueued(post),
43→            isUploadFailed = uploadStore.isFailedPost(post),
44→            hasInProgressMediaUpload = hasInProgressMediaUpload,
45→            hasPendingMediaUpload = UploadService.hasPendingMediaUploadsForPost(post),
46→            isEligibleForAutoUpload = uploadActionUseCase.isEligibleForAutoUpload(siteModel, post),
47→            uploadWillPushChanges = uploadActionUseCase.uploadWillPushChanges(post)
48→        )
49→        uploadStatusMap[post.id] = newStatus
50→        return newStatus
51→    }
52→
53→    fun invalidateUploadStatus(localPostIds: List<Int>) {
54→        localPostIds.forEach { uploadStatusMap.remove(it) }
55→    }
56→}

21→        // Sub-menu element that opens a sub-menu when clicked
22→        data class SubMenu(
23→            override val id: String,
24→            override val text: UiString,
25→            val children: List<MenuElementData>,
26→            @DrawableRes override val leadingIcon: Int = NO_ICON,
27→        ) : Item(id, text, leadingIcon)
28→    }
29→}
30→
31→internal const val NO_ICON = -1
32→

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.posts
 2→
 3→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 4→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.generated.MediaActionBuilder
 6→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.MediaModel
 7→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 8→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore
 9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.MediaStore.MediaPayload
10→
11→/**
12→ * This is a temporary class to make the PostListViewModel more manageable. Please feel free to refactor it any way
13→ * you see fit.
14→ */
15→class PostListFeaturedImageTracker(private val dispatcher: Dispatcher, private val mediaStore: MediaStore) {
16→    /*
17→    Using `SparseArray` is results in ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when we are trying to put a new item. Although
18→    the reason for the crash is unclear, this defeats the whole purpose of using a `SparseArray`. Furthermore,
19→    `SparseArray` is actually not objectively better than using a `HashMap` and in this case `HashMap` should perform
20→    better due to higher number of items.
21→
22→    https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/11487
23→     */
24→    @SuppressLint("UseSparseArrays")
25→    private val featuredImageMap = HashMap<Long, String>()
26→
27→    fun getFeaturedImageUrl(site: SiteModel, featuredImageId: Long): String? {
28→        if (featuredImageId == 0L) {
29→            return null
30→        }
31→        featuredImageMap[featuredImageId]?.let { return it }
32→        mediaStore.getSiteMediaWithId(site, featuredImageId)?.let { media ->
33→            // This should be a pretty rare case, but some media seems to be missing url
34→            return if (media.url.isNotBlank()) {
35→                featuredImageMap[featuredImageId] = media.url
36→                media.url
37→            } else null
38→        }
39→        // Media is not in the Store, we need to download it
40→        val mediaToDownload = MediaModel(
41→            site.id,
42→            featuredImageId
43→        )
44→        val payload = MediaPayload(site, mediaToDownload)
45→        dispatcher.dispatch(MediaActionBuilder.newFetchMediaAction(payload))
46→        return null
47→    }
48→
49→    fun invalidateFeaturedMedia(featuredImageIds: List<Long>) {
50→        featuredImageIds.forEach { featuredImageMap.remove(it) }
51→    }
52→}

 61→@SuppressLint("SetJavaScriptEnabled")
 62→@AndroidEntryPoint
 63→class SiteMonitorParentActivity : AppCompatActivity(), SiteMonitorWebViewClient.SiteMonitorWebViewClientListener {
 64→    @Inject
 65→    lateinit var siteMonitorUtils: SiteMonitorUtils
 66→
 67→    private var savedStateSparseArray = SparseArray<Fragment.SavedState>()
 68→    private var currentSelectItemId = 0
 69→
 70→    private val siteMonitorParentViewModel: SiteMonitorParentViewModel by viewModels()
 71→
 72→    private val metricsWebView by lazy {
 73→        commonWebView(SiteMonitorType.METRICS)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    private val phpLogsWebView by lazy {
 77→        commonWebView(SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS)
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    private val webServerLogsWebView by lazy {
 81→        commonWebView(SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS)
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    private fun commonWebView(
 85→        siteMonitorType: SiteMonitorType
 86→    ) = WebView(this@SiteMonitorParentActivity).apply {
 87→        layoutParams = ViewGroup.LayoutParams(
 88→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
 89→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
 90→        )
 91→        scrollBarStyle = View.SCROLLBARS_INSIDE_OVERLAY
 92→        settings.userAgentString = siteMonitorUtils.getUserAgent()
 93→        settings.javaScriptEnabled = true
 94→        settings.domStorageEnabled = true
 95→        webViewClient = SiteMonitorWebViewClient(this@SiteMonitorParentActivity, siteMonitorType)
 96→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {
 97→            // not sure about this one, double check if this works as expected
 98→            settings.isAlgorithmicDarkeningAllowed = true
 99→        }
100→    }
101→
102→    @Suppress("DEPRECATION")
103→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
104→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
105→
106→        if (savedInstanceState != null) {
107→            savedStateSparseArray = savedInstanceState.getSparseParcelableArray(
108→                SAVED_STATE_CONTAINER_KEY
109→            )
110→                ?: savedStateSparseArray
111→            currentSelectItemId = savedInstanceState.getInt(SAVED_STATE_CURRENT_TAB_KEY)
112→            siteMonitorParentViewModel.loadData()
113→        } else {
114→            siteMonitorParentViewModel.start(getSite())
115→            currentSelectItemId = getInitialTab()
116→        }
117→        setContent {
118→            AppTheme {
119→                Surface(
120→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
121→                ) {
122→                    SiteMonitorScreen(initialTab = currentSelectItemId)
123→                }
124→            }
125→        }
126→    }
127→
128→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
129→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
130→        outState.putSparseParcelableArray(SAVED_STATE_CONTAINER_KEY, savedStateSparseArray)
131→        outState.putInt(SAVED_STATE_CURRENT_TAB_KEY, currentSelectItemId)
132→    }
133→
134→    private fun getSite(): SiteModel {
135→        return requireNotNull(intent.getSerializableExtraCompat(WordPress.SITE)) as SiteModel
136→    }
137→
138→    private fun getInitialTab(): Int {
139→        val tab = intent?.getSerializableExtraCompat(ARG_SITE_MONITOR_TYPE_KEY) as SiteMonitorType?
140→            ?: SiteMonitorType.METRICS
141→        return when (tab) {
142→            SiteMonitorType.METRICS -> 0
143→            SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS -> 1
144→            SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS -> 2
145→        }
146→    }
147→
148→    companion object {
149→        const val ARG_SITE_MONITOR_TYPE_KEY = "ARG_SITE_MONITOR_TYPE_KEY"
150→        const val SAVED_STATE_CONTAINER_KEY = "ContainerKey"
151→        const val SAVED_STATE_CURRENT_TAB_KEY = "CurrentTabKey"
152→    }
153→
154→    @Composable
155→    @SuppressLint("UnusedMaterialScaffoldPaddingParameter")
156→    fun SiteMonitorScreen(initialTab: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
157→        Scaffold(
158→            topBar = {
159→                MainTopAppBar(
160→                    title = stringResource(id = R.string.site_monitoring),
161→                    navigationIcon = NavigationIcons.BackIcon,
162→                    onNavigationIconClick = onBackPressedDispatcher::onBackPressed,
163→                )
164→            },
165→            content = {
166→                SiteMonitorHeader(initialTab, modifier = modifier)
167→            }
168→        )
169→    }
170→
171→    @Composable
172→    @SuppressLint("UnusedMaterialScaffoldPaddingParameter")
173→    fun SiteMonitorHeader(initialTab: Int, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
174→        var tabIndex by remember { mutableStateOf(initialTab) }
175→
176→        val tabs = SiteMonitorTabItem.entries
177→
178→        LaunchedEffect(true) {
179→            siteMonitorUtils.trackTabLoaded(tabs[initialTab].siteMonitorType)
180→        }
181→
182→        Column(modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth()) {
183→            TabRow(
184→                selectedTabIndex = tabIndex,
185→                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface,
186→                contentColor = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface,
187→                indicator = { tabPositions ->
188→                    // Customizing the indicator color and style
189→                    TabRowDefaults.Indicator(
190→                        Modifier.tabIndicatorOffset(tabPositions[tabIndex]),
191→                        color = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface,
192→                        height = 2.0.dp
193→                    )
194→                }
195→            ) {
196→                tabs.forEachIndexed { index, item ->
197→                    Tab(
198→                        text = {
199→                            Column(horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally) {
200→                                Text(
201→                                    text = stringResource(item.title).uppercase(),
202→                                    maxLines = 1,
203→                                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
204→                                )
205→                            }
206→                        },
207→                        selected = tabIndex == index,
208→                        onClick = {
209→                            siteMonitorUtils.trackTabLoaded(tabs[index].siteMonitorType)
210→                            tabIndex = index
211→                        },
212→                    )
213→                }
214→            }
215→            when (tabIndex) {
216→                0 -> SiteMonitorTabContent(SiteMonitorType.METRICS)
217→                1 -> SiteMonitorTabContent(SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS)
218→                2 -> SiteMonitorTabContent(SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS)
219→            }
220→        }
221→    }
222→
223→    @Composable
224→    private fun SiteMonitorTabContent(tabType: SiteMonitorType, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
225→        val uiState by remember(key1 = tabType) {
226→            siteMonitorParentViewModel.getUiState(tabType)
227→        }
228→        when (uiState) {
229→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Preparing -> LoadingState(modifier)
230→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Prepared, is SiteMonitorUiState.Loaded ->
231→                SiteMonitorWebViewContent(uiState, tabType, modifier)
232→
233→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Error -> SiteMonitorError(uiState as SiteMonitorUiState.Error, modifier)
234→        }
235→    }
236→
237→    @Composable
238→    fun LoadingState(modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
239→        Box(
240→            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center,
241→            modifier = modifier.fillMaxSize()
242→        ) {
243→            CircularProgressIndicator(
244→                color = MaterialTheme.colors.onSurface
245→            )
246→        }
247→    }
248→
249→    @Composable
250→    fun SiteMonitorError(error: SiteMonitorUiState.Error, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
251→        Column(
252→            horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
253→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center,
254→            modifier = modifier
255→                .padding(20.dp)
256→                .fillMaxWidth()
257→                .fillMaxHeight(),
258→        ) {
259→            androidx.compose.material.Text(
260→                text = uiStringText(uiString = error.title),
261→                style = androidx.compose.material.MaterialTheme.typography.h5,
262→                textAlign = TextAlign.Center
263→            )
264→            androidx.compose.material.Text(
265→                text = uiStringText(uiString = error.description),
266→                style = androidx.compose.material.MaterialTheme.typography.body1,
267→                textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
268→                modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp)
269→            )
270→            if (error.button != null) {
271→                Button(
272→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 8.dp),
273→                    onClick = error.button.click
274→                ) {
275→                    Text(text = uiStringText(uiString = error.button.text))
276→                }
277→            }
278→        }
279→    }
280→
281→    @SuppressLint("SetJavaScriptEnabled")
282→    @Composable
283→    private fun SiteMonitorWebViewContent(
284→        uiState: SiteMonitorUiState,
285→        tabType: SiteMonitorType,
286→        modifier: Modifier = Modifier
287→    ) {
288→        // retrieve the webview from the actvity
289→        val webView = when (tabType) {
290→            SiteMonitorType.METRICS -> metricsWebView
291→            SiteMonitorType.PHP_LOGS -> phpLogsWebView
292→            SiteMonitorType.WEB_SERVER_LOGS -> webServerLogsWebView
293→        }
294→
295→        when(uiState) {
296→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Prepared -> {
297→                webView.postUrl(WPWebViewActivity.WPCOM_LOGIN_URL, uiState.model.addressToLoad.toByteArray())
298→                LoadingState()
299→            }
300→            is SiteMonitorUiState.Loaded -> {
301→                SiteMonitorWebView(webView, tabType, modifier)
302→            }
303→            else -> {}
304→        }
305→    }
306→
307→    @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterialApi::class)
308→    @Composable
309→    private fun SiteMonitorWebView(tabWebView: WebView, tabType: SiteMonitorType, modifier: Modifier = Modifier) {
310→        // the webview is retrieved from the activity, so we need to use a mutable variable
311→        // to assign to android view
312→        var webView = tabWebView
313→
314→        val refreshState = siteMonitorParentViewModel.getRefreshState(tabType)
315→
316→        val pullRefreshState = rememberPullRefreshState(
317→            refreshing = refreshState.value,
318→            onRefresh = { siteMonitorParentViewModel.refreshData(tabType) }
319→        )
320→
321→        Box(
322→            modifier = modifier
323→                .fillMaxSize()
324→                .pullRefresh(pullRefreshState)
325→        ) {
326→            LazyColumn(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxHeight()) {
327→                item {
328→                    AndroidView(
329→                        factory = { webView },
330→                        update = { webView = it },
331→                        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
332→                    )
333→                }
334→            }
335→            PullRefreshIndicator(
336→                refreshing = refreshState.value,
337→                state = pullRefreshState,
338→                modifier = Modifier.align(Alignment.TopCenter),
339→                contentColor = MaterialTheme.colors.primaryVariant,
340→            )
341→        }
342→    }
343→
344→    override fun onDestroy() {
345→        super.onDestroy()
346→        metricsWebView.destroy()
347→        phpLogsWebView.destroy()
348→        webServerLogsWebView.destroy()
349→    }
350→
351→    override fun onWebViewPageLoaded(url: String, tabType: SiteMonitorType) =
352→        siteMonitorParentViewModel.onUrlLoaded(tabType)
353→
354→    override fun onWebViewReceivedError(url: String, tabType: SiteMonitorType) {
355→        siteMonitorParentViewModel.onWebViewError(tabType)
356→        siteMonitorUtils.trackTabLoadingError(tabType)
357→    }
358→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.reader.utils
  2→
  3→import androidx.collection.SparseArrayCompat
  4→import androidx.collection.forEach
  5→import androidx.collection.isNotEmpty
  6→import androidx.collection.set
  7→import org.wordpress.android.R
  8→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTag
  9→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagList
 10→import org.wordpress.android.models.ReaderTagType
 11→import org.wordpress.android.ui.compose.components.menu.dropdown.MenuElementData
 12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.UiString
 13→import org.wordpress.android.util.config.ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 14→import org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.indexOrNull
 15→import javax.inject.Inject
 16→
 17→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor(
 18→    private val readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig: ReaderTagsFeedFeatureConfig
 19→) {
 20→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 21→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 23→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 26→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 29→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 32→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 35→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { followedP2sIndex ->
 38→                add(createFollowedP2sItem(
 39→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followedP2sIndex),
 40→                    text = readerTagsList[followedP2sIndex].tagTitle,
 41→                ))
 42→            }
 43→            if (readerTagsFeedFeatureConfig.isEnabled()) {
 44→                readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isTags }?.let { tagsIndex ->
 45→                    add(createTagsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(tagsIndex)))
 46→                }
 47→            }
 48→            readerTagsList
 49→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 50→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 51→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 52→                    }
 53→                    sparseArray
 54→                }
 55→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 56→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 57→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 58→                    if (customListsArray.size() <= 2) {
 59→                        customListsArray.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 60→                            add(createCustomListItem(index, readerTag))
 61→                        }
 62→                    } else {
 63→                        add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 64→                    }
 65→                }
 66→        }
 67→    }
 68→
 69→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 70→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 71→            id = id,
 72→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 73→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 74→        )
 75→    }
 76→
 77→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 78→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 79→            id = id,
 80→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 81→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 82→        )
 83→    }
 84→
 85→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 86→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 87→            id = id,
 88→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 89→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 90→        )
 91→    }
 92→
 93→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 94→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 95→            id = id,
 96→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 97→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 98→        )
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
102→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
103→            id = id,
104→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
105→        )
106→    }
107→
108→    private fun createFollowedP2sItem(id: String, text: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
109→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
110→            id = id,
111→            text = UiString.UiStringText(text),
112→        )
113→    }
114→
115→    private fun createTagsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
116→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
117→            id = id,
118→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_tags),
119→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_tags_24dp,
120→        )
121→    }
122→
123→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
124→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
125→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
126→            customListsMenuItems.add(createCustomListItem(index, readerTag))
127→        }
128→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
129→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
130→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
131→            id = "custom-lists",
132→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
133→            children = customListsMenuItems,
134→        )
135→    }
136→
137→    private fun createCustomListItem(index: Int, readerTag: ReaderTag): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
138→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
139→            id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
140→            text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
141→        )
142→    }
143→
144→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
145→
146→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
147→}
148→
